description: Product description ✨ Embrace a Christmas Tree That Never Melts ✨ This Christmas tree-shaped hugging pillow transforms a holiday symbol into a tangible, soft companion. It's more than just a pillow—it's a plush friend to hug, a playful room decoration, and a heartfelt gift that spreads warmth. Bring a season of sweetness and security to your family and children with its fluffy embrace. 🎄 Key Product Features Exquisite Tree Design: A classic green Christmas tree shape, standing 30cm tall, instantly brightens any festive setting. Delicately embroidered stars and ornament details add traditional Christmas charm. Ultra-Soft Hugging Experience: Made with high-density short plush fabric and filled with generous PP cotton, it offers an incredibly soft, skin-friendly touch—perfect for cozy, comforting hugs or lounging. Safe & Trusted Materials: The fabric is gentle on skin and non-shedding, while the filling is safety-certified and odor-free, ensuring healthy, worry-free closeness for the whole family. Versatile Use: Functions as creative décor for sofas and bedrooms, a cute companion in kids' rooms, or a thoughtful return gift for Christmas parties and birthdays—both practical and meaningful. Ideal Golden Size: With its 20cm width × 30cm height proportions, this pillow is perfectly sized for easy carrying and hugging, while fitting beautifully on sofas, beds, and various seats. 📦 Product Specifications & Contents Dimensions: 20 cm wide × 30 cm high Includes: 1 × Christmas tree-shaped pillow 🏠 Multiple Uses to Brighten Every Corner A Cozy Companion: Perfect as a comforting buddy, a naptime pillow, or a soft support while reading. Festive Atmosphere Essential: Place it on the sofa, bedside, windowsill, or under the Christmas tree to instantly enhance holiday vibes. Creative Gift Option: An ideal choice for Christmas gifts, birthday presents, party favors, or New Year’s greetings—spreading warmth and joy. Home Décor Accent: Adds a playful and cute touch to children’s rooms, living rooms, bedrooms, or any living space. 💝 Why Choose Our Christmas Tree Pillow? ✅ Quality Craftsmanship: Neat and durable stitching with exquisite embroidery details, built to withstand daily use and hugs. ✅ Thoughtfully Designed Size: The 20×30cm size is designed for optimal comfort, offering both great huggability and decorative appeal. ✅ Emotional Connection: Its adorable shape and soft texture create warm memories that grow with you. ✅ Festive Ritual: Makes Christmas decor interactive—something to touch, hold, and integrate into daily moments. ⚠️ Important Care & Unboxing Note To ensure minimal environmental impact during shipping, your pillow arrives in a vacuum-sealed package. Please follow these steps for best results: Carefully open the packaging. Gently pat and fluff the pillow to help loosen the fibers. Allow it to rest and fully expand for 24–48 hours to regain its perfect, fluffy shape. A little patience will reward you with a beautifully restored Christmas tree pillow! Safety Warning To be used under the direct supervision of an adult
